panel.title: <:GVRY_pfp:1500241318465638601>  _Greenville Roleplay Legacy_ - ___Server Support___
panel.description:
> <a:BlueButterflies:1497980075008852028> Welcome to the **Greenville Roleplay Legacy Support Hub!** This channel is here to help you get **assistance quickly and efficiently. Whether you need help with general questions, reporting an issue, or reaching staff, please open the appropriate** ticket below
**__General Support__**
> <a:recolored_arrowmove:1499985868541133038> Use this option for any questions about rules, sessions, or server features. You can also request partnerships, claim perks, or inquire about applications here. Please do not use this option to report users—there are specific tickets for that

**__Civilian Report__**
> <a:recolored_arrowmove:1499985868541133038> Select this option if you need to report a civilian suspected of violating server rules. Be sure to include clear evidence so the High Command team can properly review and take action if necessary. If you need additional help, a staff member can assist you further within the ticket

**__Staff Report__**
> <a:recolored_arrowmove:1499985868541133038> Use this to report a staff member who may not be following server guidelines. Evidence is required for all reports so the High Command team can investigate accordingly. If needed, request assistance from a High Command member within your ticket

<:blue_replyarrow:1499985515527667883> **Important Information:** Tickets that receive no response within 24 hours will be closed automatically. Please allow approximately 2–3 hours for a response, depending on staff availability.

vanity.embed_description: > <a:BlueButterflies:1497980075008852028>  We thank {user} for applying the `{code}` vanity code within your discord status! Due to your **endless** support for our community we have rewarded you with the {role} role!

startup.title: <:GVRL:1498384697963712724>  _Greenville Roleplay Legacy_ - ___Session Startup___
startup.description:
> <a:BlueButterflies:1497980075008852028>  {user} is now hosting a **Greenville Roleplay Yowe, Roleplay Session**. Before attending, please ensure you have thoroughly read and understand our Server Material, which contains all essential **Session Rules**. For this session to officially begin, we require **__{required}+__** reactions before preparation.

 **Before Attending: Essential Checklist** 
> <a:BlueButterflies:1497980075008852028>  Please confirm you are not using any Banned Vehicles unless you possess the appropriate roles. 
> <a:BlueButterflies:1497980075008852028> **Verify your Roblox account** with **Greenville Roleplay Yowe Bot** to prevent an unintended kick during the checkpoint process. 
> <a:BlueButterflies:1497980075008852028>  Ensure all of your vehicles are registered by using the command `/register` in the dedicated Bot-Inputs Channel.

setup.title: <:GVRL:1498384697963712724>  _Greenville Roleplay Legacy_ - ___Roleplay Preparation:___
setup.description:
> <a:BlueButterflies:1497980075008852028>  {user} is currently setting up their roleplay experience. 
 > <a:BlueButterflies:1497980075008852028>  Please be patient while the **Staff Team** completes the session setup for a **high-quality roleplay experience.**

early_access.title: <:GVRL:1498384697963712724>  _Greenville Roleplay Legacy_ - ___Early Access___
early_access.description:
<a:BlueButterflies:1497980075008852028>  {user} has officially released **Early Access** for their roleplay experience. Members with access to the link may now start joining. Upon joining, **please park your vehicle, and wait for further instructions** from the host. 

 > <a:BlueButterflies:1497980075008852028>  Sharing this link with anyone who doesn't have permission will result in immediate **moderation(s).**

regen.title: <:GVRY_pfp:1500241318465638601>  _Greenville Roleplay Yowe_ - ___Link Regeneration___
regen.description: > <a:recolored_arrowmove:1499985868541133038>  {user} is now **regenerating** the session link. To maintain an organized queue, please adhere to the following rule(s). Re-Invitations and new links are processed automatically every 20-30 minutes. Any direct requests or "pings" to the host regarding invitations or reinvites during this waiting period will result in an immediate mute.

quota_requirements.title: {stars} _Greenville Roleplay Yowe_ - ___Staff Quota Requirements___ {stars}
quota_requirements.description:
To maintain an active and professional staff team, all members are required to meet the following weekly quotas:

**Low Command Requirements:**
> {arrow}  **Minimum Hosted:** `7` Sessions
> {arrow}  **Minimum Co-Hosted:** `5` Session 
> {arrow}  **Deal With Tickets That Dont Require Middle Command** 

**Middle Command Requirements:**
> {arrow}  **Minimum Hosted:** `5` Sessions
> {arrow}  **Minimum Co-Hosted:** `5` Sessions
> {arrow}  **Deal With Tickets That Dont Require High Command** 

**High Command Requirements:**
> {arrow}  **Minimum Hosted:** `2` Sessions
> {arrow}  **Minimum Co-Hosted:** `4` Sessions
> {arrow}  **Deal With Tickets That Dont Require Ownership** 

**Overseer Requirements:**
> {arrow}  Oversee High Command & Server Operations
> {arrow}  Conduct Terminations/Demotions Based On Activity
> {arrow}  Handle Tickets That Dont Require Executives

**Important Notes:**
└ Quotas are reset every other Sunday.
└ Failure to meet quota without an approved LOA may result in a strike, demotion or termination.
└ Use `/sessionlog` immediately after your session to ensure it is counted.
